title: Mid-century sectional sofa
description: Three-seat sectional in charcoal linen. Purchased in 2019, lightly used, no pet hair, no smokers. One small scuff on the back-left leg. Solid frame, cushions still firm. 94" × 36" × 32". Cash and carry; you'll need two people and a truck or SUV to move it.

title: Vintage steel road bike, 56cm
description: Classic lugged-steel road bike, 56cm frame (fits riders around 5'9" to 6'0"). Recently tuned: new brake pads, fresh bar tape, drivetrain cleaned and lubed. Friction shifters on the downtube; 2×7 setup. Tires have a season left.

title: Brass arc floor lamp
description: Heavy marble base, 76" arc. Takes a standard E26 bulb (not included). Small patina on the arm from sun exposure; otherwise clean. Dimmer built into the cord.

title: Film camera, 35mm
description: Well-loved 35mm rangefinder. Light seals redone two years ago. Comes with a 50mm f/1.8 prime and a leather half-case. Shutter fires at all speeds, meter accurate. Two rolls of film included.

title: Chrome 2-slice toaster
description: Basic 2-slice chrome toaster. Six browning levels, bagel + defrost settings, crumb tray pulls out cleanly. Works perfectly; we just upgraded to a 4-slice.

title: Oak dining table, seats 4
description: Solid oak, pedestal base, 48" diameter. A couple of watermarks on the top; easy to sand and re-oil if you care. Chairs not included.

title: Vinyl records, box of 6
description: Six records, all classic-rock staples. Sleeves worn but wax is clean. List on request or come look.
